## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between GrowthX and Attentive to discuss content strategies, AI tools, and industry challenges.](https://fathom.video/share/zFua5KaC6msCNPMhPDvJNGfgd6WinF1N?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Attentive experiencing growth due to competitor sunsetting products; launching major Black Friday campaign](https://fathom.video/share/zFua5KaC6msCNPMhPDvJNGfgd6WinF1N?tab=summary&timestamp=36.0)
  - [GrowthX offers high-volume, high-quality content production (1-2 pieces/day) with custom AI workflows and human editing](https://fathom.video/share/zFua5KaC6msCNPMhPDvJNGfgd6WinF1N?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
  - [Attentive faces challenges with SME input and data access for creating unique, insightful content](https://fathom.video/share/zFua5KaC6msCNPMhPDvJNGfgd6WinF1N?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)
  - [Both parties see value in top-of-funnel content for LLMs and organic search, despite shifting landscapes](https://fathom.video/share/zFua5KaC6msCNPMhPDvJNGfgd6WinF1N?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)

## Topics

### Attentive Company Update

  - [Competitor sunset email/SMS product, driving customer acquisition for Attentive](https://fathom.video/share/zFua5KaC6msCNPMhPDvJNGfgd6WinF1N?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)
  - [Launching major Black Friday campaign (biggest of the year)](https://fathom.video/share/zFua5KaC6msCNPMhPDvJNGfgd6WinF1N?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
  - [Company size \~1,100 employees (post-layoff); small marketing team of \~4](https://fathom.video/share/zFua5KaC6msCNPMhPDvJNGfgd6WinF1N?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)

### Content Creation Challenges

  - [Bottlenecks: accessing data and SME input for unique insights](https://fathom.video/share/zFua5KaC6msCNPMhPDvJNGfgd6WinF1N?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)
  - [Publishing cadence: historically 1 SEO-focused piece/week + higher-caliber projects](https://fathom.video/share/zFua5KaC6msCNPMhPDvJNGfgd6WinF1N?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)
  - [Desire for AI tools to review/evaluate content post-creation](https://fathom.video/share/zFua5KaC6msCNPMhPDvJNGfgd6WinF1N?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
  - [Using external briefs (possibly from Profound) for SEO/AI optimization](https://fathom.video/share/zFua5KaC6msCNPMhPDvJNGfgd6WinF1N?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)

### GrowthX Services Overview

  - [Offer 8-week strategy sprint to ensure mutual fit](https://fathom.video/share/zFua5KaC6msCNPMhPDvJNGfgd6WinF1N?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)
  - [Produce 1-2 high-quality content pieces daily for most clients](https://fathom.video/share/zFua5KaC6msCNPMhPDvJNGfgd6WinF1N?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
  - [Use custom AI workflows, research agents, and human editors](https://fathom.video/share/zFua5KaC6msCNPMhPDvJNGfgd6WinF1N?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
  - [Cost efficiency: \~10 cents/word, typically less than one full-time hire](https://fathom.video/share/zFua5KaC6msCNPMhPDvJNGfgd6WinF1N?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Focus on scaling quality through iterative process improvement](https://fathom.video/share/zFua5KaC6msCNPMhPDvJNGfgd6WinF1N?tab=summary&timestamp=1367.0)

### Industry Landscape

  - [Attentive's main competitors: Klaviyo, Iterable](https://fathom.video/share/zFua5KaC6msCNPMhPDvJNGfgd6WinF1N?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)
  - [Shifting focus towards orchestration (beyond just SMS)](https://fathom.video/share/zFua5KaC6msCNPMhPDvJNGfgd6WinF1N?tab=summary&timestamp=958.0)
  - [Importance of both LLM optimization and traditional SEO](https://fathom.video/share/zFua5KaC6msCNPMhPDvJNGfgd6WinF1N?tab=summary&timestamp=1559.0)

### Content Strategy for LLMs and SEO

  - [Value in creating top/middle-of-funnel content for brand awareness](https://fathom.video/share/zFua5KaC6msCNPMhPDvJNGfgd6WinF1N?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)
  - [LLM training data consideration for long-term brand visibility](https://fathom.video/share/zFua5KaC6msCNPMhPDvJNGfgd6WinF1N?tab=summary&timestamp=1499.0)
  - [Balancing efforts between LLM optimization and traditional SEO](https://fathom.video/share/zFua5KaC6msCNPMhPDvJNGfgd6WinF1N?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)

## Next Steps

  - Angela to rewatch GrowthX workshop for more insights
  - Golden Gate to keep Angela informed about future Bay Area events and workshops
  - Potential for future collaboration, given Angela's relevant background
